TandemParc Holdings, Inc. (PH) Privacy Notice and Retention Workflow for HR, Tax, Banking, and Capital Markets Records
Data controller: TandemParc Holdings, Inc., 21F Orion Center, Makati City 1200, Philippines; DPO contact: dpo@tandemparc.ph (role mailbox)
Under the Data Privacy Act, personal data means any information from which an individual’s identity is apparent or can be reasonably and directly ascertained, or when put together with other information.
We process: employee numbers, payroll bank details, TIN (form field only: ___-___-___-___), generic HR files; and investor relations contact lists limited to business emails.
Bank references and BIR-related payroll withholding records are retained for 10 years for audit; account labels may appear (e.g., Account No.: 000-XYZ-1234) without full PAN or CVV.
Capital-markets records include drafts and final SEC 17-A, 17-Q, and 17-C; public copies are available via SEC and PSE EDGE and are not treated as confidential once posted (e.g., our Q1 2024 17-C on transfer agent change).
Press releases and website FAQs summarizing already-announced dividends from FY2022 remain public and are excluded from MNPI controls.
Employees with access to non-public draft 17-A/17-Q/17-C content must observe an internal blackout window from five trading days before to two trading days after public posting on PSE EDGE; selective disclosure is prohibited under SRC Rule 17.
Materiality is assessed relative to the issuer and a reasonable investor standard; immaterial internal IT upgrades and branch operating hours are out of scope.
To access, correct, or delete personal data, submit a DSAR via privacy.tandemparc.ph or mail to the DPO Office; we verify identity using employee ID or vendor code (no passports or government IDs requested by email).
Cross-border transfers to processors (e.g., payroll SaaS in a sandbox environment) are governed by contracts with data privacy undertakings; no special categories are exported without NPC-compliant safeguards.
Draft SEC files are retained for 2 years after posting; HR files for 5 years post-separation; payroll and tax records for 10 years per audit needs; upon expiry, records are anonymized or securely shredded.
We do not collect credit card CVV, bank PINs, or e-wallet passcodes; generic form placeholders such as “Passport No.: AA0000000” and “SSS: 99-9999999-9” in templates are non-operative and not stored.
